---
name: Task
about: Track an implementation task, enhancement, or project maintenance item.
title: "[TASK]"
labels: 'Difficulty: Medium'
assignees: ''

---

## Task description

Describe the task clearly, and provide related paper links, code references, or other resources if applicable.

## Implementation notes
Describe the implementation requirements, and provide a high-level overview of the implementation plan if possible.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code has been implemented or updated.
- [ ] Tests, notebooks, or examples have been updated if needed.
- [ ] Documentation has been updated if needed.
- [ ] The change has been verified locally if possible.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, links, logs, or other context here.
